business.name: Trustable Electrician Columbus
business.tagline: Electrical work done right the first time

hero.headline: *Every wire, every outlet* — handled with care
hero.subheadline: Licensed Columbus electricians who show up when we say we will and fix what needs fixing. No surprises, no shortcuts.

services_section.label: THE ELECTRICAL WORK
services_section.heading: From panels to outlets, we handle it all
services_section.subheading: Every job gets the same careful attention, whether it's a quick repair or a full system upgrade

services.title: Electrical Panel Upgrades
services.description: Old panels can't handle modern demands. We'll assess your system and upgrade safely, bringing your home up to current standards.

services.title: Electrical System Inspections
services.description: Complete electrical safety checks to spot problems before they become expensive repairs. We test everything and explain what we find.

services.title: Outlet & Switch Installation
services.description: New outlets where you need them, switches that actually work. We'll wire it right and protect your walls while we work.

services.title: Electrical Repairs
services.description: When something stops working, we find the real problem and fix it permanently. No band-aids, just solid electrical work.

about.heading: Columbus electricians who care about the details
about.body: We're the electrical team Columbus homeowners call when they want the job done right. Every wire placed carefully, every connection tested, every workspace left clean. Our 4.8-star rating comes from treating every home like it's our own and making sure the electrical work lasts.

reviews.name: Mae M.
reviews.text: They handled our panel upgrade perfectly. The electrician was professional and clearly knew his stuff.

reviews.name: Maria B.
reviews.text: Thorough electrical inspection and careful repairs. This is a company you can actually trust with your home.

reviews.name: Jonathon B.
reviews.text: Worked with my tight schedule and delivered excellent results. True professional who treated my home with respect.

reviews.name: Charlotte R.
reviews.text: They protected everything around the work area and left the place spotless. Careful, attentive service.

service_areas.label: SERVICE COVERAGE
service_areas.heading: Serving Columbus and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Licensed electrical services throughout central Ohio

cta.heading: Ready for electrical work you can trust?
cta.body: Get a free estimate on your electrical project. We'll assess the work, explain what needs doing, and give you a straight answer on cost and timeline.
